entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop grown in the rabi season in India

entities.name: LEGUMES
entities.description: Short duration crops used for opportunity double cropping

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study on rabi sorghum areas is conducted

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period during which soils are often left fallow and exposed to erosion

entities.name: POST-RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The period during which sorghum is grown

entities.name: SOIL EROSION
entities.description: Degradation of fallow soils caused by run-off during the rainy season

entities.name: DOUBLE CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two crops in a year on the same land

entities.name: LENGTH OF GROWING SEASON
entities.description: The period during which plant growth is possible, denoted as LGS

entities.name: SOIL WATER BALANCE APPROACH
entities.description: The method used to analyze historical weather data to determine LGS

entities.name: WATER HOLDING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of soil to retain water, which influences double cropping potential

entities.name: SOIL WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of water in the soil required to provide sufficient LGS
